title: Starchef Apple Fruit Cutter,Slicer,Divider,Corer,Wedger,Stainless Steel,Slicer for Apples,Pears,Fruits,Ergonomic Handle, Easy Grip, Sharp Blade,(8 Slices,Green)
features: MORE DURABLE-Unlike some other products that look the same but cut corners whose weight are only 80g and much lighter than ours.Ours are as heavy as 95g and much stronger and durable than other ordinary ones.
DURABLE CONSTRUCTION-The mainstay is one-piece design,making it more durable and hygienic, no place for bacteria to hide.

ERGONOMIC HANDLE-Look at this novel apple cutter.The anti-slip rubber handle is just like the steering wheel of a luxurious ship,making it quite comfortable for gripping and quite easy to exert strength.

SHARP BLADE AND FIRMLY FIXED-Please be careful of the blade when cutting an apple because the blade is well polished and fairly sharp.Within several seconds,8 slices of apple is done.Moreover,the blade is firmly fixed on the mainstay.No chance to slip off.

SUITABLE FOR MOST APPLES-Comparing with many other small apple slicers whose inner sizes are only below 8CM,ours is much larger.The inner size of our slicer is 10.5CM,which is suitable for most apples except extremely large ones.
description: Product Description New Concept Apple Cutter Look at this new concept apple cutter.It is made of one-piece ABS material which is sturdy enough to endure much strengh.No need to worry about getting broken.Besides,one-piece design makes it more hygienic and pretty easy to wash after use! Anti-rusty and Fairly Sharp Blade The blade is made of food-grade stainless steel material which is hard enough and fairly sharp.Save you much strength and get apples slices just in one second.Attention!Never put your fingers on the blade! Look the Same but Different!Please Recognize Starchef! Large Apple Corer！ The inner diameter of Starchef apple corer is as large as 10.8cm which can deal with various sizes of apples,no matter small ones or large ones.
